full_text:
Dai Yuan 戴員
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Dai Yuan (戴員)was born in Wu. Killed Sun Yi, Bian Hong and Sun He before he was assassinated. Dai Yuan was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom and the Wei Kingdom. Dai Yuan lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
